title: Brevo vs HubSpot (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Brevo vs HubSpot: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Brevo and HubSpot comes down to your specific use case. Brevo is built for transactional email and multi-channel marketing, while HubSpot targets businesses that want email and CRM in one platform.

comparison_table.tool_b: Businesses That Want Email And Crm In One Platform

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on transactional email and multi-channel marketing
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on businesses that want email and CRM in one platform

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Brevo wins for transactional email and multi-channel marketing, while HubSpot is stronger for businesses that want email and CRM in one platform.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Brevo or HubSpot?
faq.a: HubSpot starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from HubSpot to Brevo?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
